identity_baseline: A green-skinned Martian Warhoon chieftain and warlord.
origin_or_historical_context: Martian setting; member of the Warhoon tribe.
stable_visual_summary: Dak Kova is a ferocious, green-skinned Martian chieftain of the Warhoon. He possesses a scarred physique and carries himself with a primal, animalistic intensity. As a warlord, his silhouette is defined by Warhoon warrior gear and the potential use of tusks as weaponry during combat.
costume_signature: Warhoon warrior gear; likely utilizes tusks as weapons.
relationship_notes: Leader of the Warhoon Warriors / Warhoon Horde
continuity_constraints: Must maintain green skin tone and scarred texture.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific body proportions and exact age are not defined.
Exact nature of the "tusks" (whether biological or wielded tools) is unconfirmed.
